payload.title: Task list needs bounded output admission
payload.summary: Running raw narada task list emitted about 2.9k lines because the command has --range but no --limit or bounded default. This repeats the CLI output admission failure pattern: read surfaces can still flood the Operator transcript even when the agent intends a compact task check.
evidence: Observed effect: large unbounded JSON output in chat transcript
proposal: Devise a fix that makes task list output bounded by default or requires explicit unbounded admission, while preserving machine-readable workflows through explicit flags.
payload.recommendation: Promote as task_candidate for CLI output admission ergonomics

promotion.note: recorded_pending_crossing: executable promotion for target kind 'decision' is not implemented yet.
